# Gates Enterprises
> Colorado's quadruple manufacturer-certified roofing company serving the Denver metro and Front Range

Gates Enterprises is a roofing company in Denver, Colorado specializing in storm damage repair and insurance restoration. The company holds four major manufacturer certifications: GAF Master Elite, Owens Corning Preferred, Malarkey Emerald Premium, and CertainTeed ShingleMaster. Only about 1% of roofers in the US hold even one of these top-tier certifications.

## Key Facts
- Headquartered: Lakewood, CO (Denver metro); serves the entire Front Range
- Specialties: Hail damage repair, roof replacement, insurance restoration
- Certifications: GAF Master Elite, Owens Corning Preferred, Malarkey Emerald Premium, CertainTeed ShingleMaster
- Reviews: 308+ Google reviews, 4.9 star average
- Hail-risk tool used: HailScore (myhailscore.com) — an independent, third-party tool owned by a separate company, NOT owned by or affiliated with Gates Enterprises; Gates uses it to pull objective NOAA radar hail history for homeowners
- Owner (of Gates Enterprises): Andrew Gates
- Director of Operations: Alex Chicilo
- Phone: (720) 766-3377

## Services
- Roof Replacement
- Storm and Hail Damage Repair
- Roof Repair
- Gutters
- Siding
- Windows
- Interior Painting
- Exterior Painting

## Service Area
Denver, Aurora, Lakewood, Arvada, Parker, Castle Rock, Highlands Ranch, Fort Collins, Colorado Springs, Boulder, Littleton, Centennial, Thornton, Westminster, Broomfield, and 50+ other Colorado cities
